attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
EDW.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                 
, EDW.SALES_ORDER_KEY         
, EDW.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
, EDW.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
, EDW.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT        
, EDW.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT     
, EDW.ERP_PARENT_LINE_ID            
, EDW.ITEM_TYPE_CODE                
, EDW.BK_PRODUCT_ID                 
, EDW.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID       
, EDW.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID           
, EDW.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID       
, EDW.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT    
, EDW.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE      
, MTA.SS_CODE                     
, EDW.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM  
, EDW.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
, MTA.TRANSACTION_DTM  AS MTL_TRANSACTION_DTM
, EDW.UNIT_SALE_PRICE      AS UNIT_SALE_PRICE_AMT         
, EDW.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
, EDW.DV_COMP_US_EXT_SELLING_PRC_AMT
, EDW.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT
, EDW.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT
, SUM(MTA.DV_COMP_US_MTA_COST_AMT)   AS TOTAL_MTA_COST
, SUM(EDW.DV_COMP_US_EDW_COST_AMT) AS TOTAL_EDW_COST
, (SUM(MTA.DV_COMP_US_MTA_COST_AMT) - SUM(EDW.DV_COMP_US_EDW_COST_AMT)) AS DV_COMP_US_COGS_DELTA_AMT
, USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MEASURE_COGS EDW
JOIN $$STGDB.WI_MTA_COGS MTA ON MTA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = EDW.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   
					AND EDW.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = MTA.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT 
					AND  MTA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =  EDW.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
		/*			AND MTA.SS_CODE  =  EDW.SS_CODE */
GROUP BY EDW.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                 
, EDW.SALES_ORDER_KEY         
, EDW.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
, EDW.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
, EDW.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT        
, EDW.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT     
, EDW.ERP_PARENT_LINE_ID            
, EDW.ITEM_TYPE_CODE                
, EDW.BK_PRODUCT_ID                 
, EDW.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID       
, EDW.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID           
, EDW.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID       
, EDW.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT    
, MTA.SS_CODE                     
, EDW.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM
, EDW.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE        
, EDW.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
, MTA.TRANSACTION_DTM
, EDW.UNIT_SALE_PRICE    
, EDW.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
, EDW.DV_COMP_US_EXT_SELLING_PRC_AMT
, EDW.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT
, EDW.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT
, USER
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
